description_long: This is a rustic, hand-crafted ceramic vase with a wide, rounded body and a short, flared neck. The exterior is decorated with a painted band featuring large, yellow fruit—likely lemons—accompanied by green leaves and brown stems, set against a blue background. The surface shows signs of age and weathering, with visible cracks, chips, and a matte, slightly rough finish. The rim and base are unadorned, with the natural off-white ceramic exposed, contrasting with the colorful midsection. The vase's interior appears unfinished and rough, consistent with traditional pottery techniques. Its overall appearance suggests it is both decorative and functional, suitable for outdoor or garden use.
description: A weathered, hand-painted ceramic vase with yellow fruit and green leaves on a blue band, showing signs of age and rustic charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing two prominent yellow fruits with green leaves and a visible brown stem on a blue background.
description_view_1: Side view with the blue band and fruit motif wrapping around, showing more of the vase's curvature and less of the central fruit.
description_view_2: Another side view highlighting a single yellow fruit and more of the blue and green painted area, with the rim and base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying two yellow fruits close together, with the blue band and leafy motif continuing around the vase.
